config.script:
#include "50203" #include "50516"
#define DESC_FILE "db15.desc"
#define CTRLID_UPGRADE 15
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje definicje 1 tabeli // '// strOneTable - zwraca kod tabeli // '//używane także przez 70105 // '/////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
sub generuj_create_one_table(byref oObjDef,byref strOneTable) dim flddef dim strSingleTable : strSingleTable = "" if oObjDef.ispersist then strSingleTable = strSingleTable + "create table " + oObjDef.tablename + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "IdObj integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "VersionId integer not null" for each flddef in oObjDef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strSingleTable = strSingleTable + "," + vbCrLf + vbTab + flddef.name + " " + flddef.sqltypename + " not null" if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strSingleTable = strSingleTable + "," + vbCrLf + vbTab + flddef.name + "_wrt integer not null" end if else strSingleTable = strSingleTable + "," + vbCrLf + vbTab + "-- [virtual] " + flddef.name end if end if next strSingleTable = strSingleTable + vbCrLf + ")" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf else strSingleTable = strSingleTable + "-- skipped virtual table: " + oObjDef.tablename + vbCrLf end if strOneTable = strSingleTable end sub
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje definicje tabel // '// strTables - zwraca kod tabel // '/////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
sub generuj_create_tables(byref strTables) dim stdobjdef
' 1, 1, "generowanie tablic" view_message 4057, 0
strTables = "--========= creating database tables =========" + vbCrLf
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim strSingleTable generuj_create_one_table stdobjdef,strSingleTable strTables = strTables + strSingleTable page_.updateview next
strTables = strTables + vbCrLf + "--end of tables" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end sub
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje procedury skladowane // '// strSP - zwraca kod procedury // '// bDebug - dla wersji DEBUG // '///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// sub generuj_create_sp(byref strSP, byval bDebug,byval strLinked) dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1,1,"generowanie stored procedures" view_message 4058, 0 dim strFields dim strFields2 dim strLinkedSP dim strLocal
strSP = "--========= creating standard stored procedures =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim strSingleSP : strSingleSP = "" trans_.message 0,0,"dla tablicy " + stdobjdef.tablename
if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim procname strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "-- table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf
'_select (output param) procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_select" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@idobj_par integer,@versionid_par integer output" for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_par " + flddef.sqltypename + " output" if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par " + flddef.sqltypename + " output" end if end if end if next strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ") with encryption as " + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "select @versionid_par=VersionId" 'idobj nie jest selekcjonowany bo jest znany for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_par="+ flddef.name if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par=" + flddef.name + "_wrt" end if end if end if next strSingleSP = strSingleSP + " from " + stdobjdef.tablename + " where IdObj=@idobj_par" + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "return @@rowcount" + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf '_insert procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_insert" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@idobj_par integer,@versionid_par integer" for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_par " + flddef.sqltypename if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par " + flddef.sqltypename end if end if end if next strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ") with encryption as " + vbCrLf
strFields = "" strLocal = vbTab + "insert into " + stdobjdef.tablename + " values(@idobj_par,@versionid_par" if strLinked <> "" then strLinkedSP = vbTab + "exec " + strLinked + ".." + procname + " @idobj_par,@versionid_par" end if for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strFields = strFields + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_par" if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strFields = strFields + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par" end if end if end if next strLocal = strLocal + strFields + ")" + vbCrLf if strLinked <> "" then strLinkedSP = strLinkedSP + strFields + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLinkedSP end if strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLocal strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "return @@rowcount" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf '_update procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_update" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@idobj_par integer,@versionid_par integer" for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_par " + flddef.sqltypename if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ","+ vbCrLf + vbTab + "@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par " + flddef.sqltypename end if end if end if next strSingleSP = strSingleSP + ") with encryption as " + vbCrLf strFields = "" strFields2 = "" strLocal = vbTab + "update " + stdobjdef.tablename + " set VersionId=@versionid_par" if strLinked <> "" then strLinkedSP = vbTab + "exec " + strLinked + ".." + procname + " @idobj_par,@versionid_par" end if for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.name <> "IdObj" then 'ignoruj IdObj if flddef.ispersist then strFields = strFields + "," + vbCrLf + vbTab + flddef.name + "=@" + flddef.name + "_par" strFields2 = strFields2 + ",@" + flddef.name + "_par" if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strFields = strFields + "," + vbCrLf + vbTab + flddef.name + "_wrt=@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par" strFields2 = strFields2 + ",@" + flddef.name + "_wrt_par" end if end if end if next strLocal = strLocal + strFields + vbCrLf + vbTab + "where idobj=@idobj_par" + vbCrLf if strLinked <> "" then strLinkedSP = strLinkedSP + strFields2 + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLinkedSP + vbCrLf end if
strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLocal + "return @@rowcount" + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf '_delete procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_delete" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@idobj_par integer) with encryption as " + vbCrLf strLocal = vbTab + "delete from " + stdobjdef.tablename + " where idobj=@idobj_par" + vbCrLf
if strLinked <> "" then strLinkedSP = vbTab + "exec " + strLinked + ".." + procname + " @idobj_par" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLinkedSP end if
strSingleSP = strSingleSP + strLocal + "return @@rowcount" + vbCrLf strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf '_maxid procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_maxid" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@maxid_par integer output) with encryption as " + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "select @maxid_par=max(idobj) from " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf '_candel procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_candel" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + _ "create procedure " + procname + "(@idobj_par integer) with encryption as " + vbCrLf
dim stdobjdef2 dim flddef2
dim iter_candel : iter_candel = 0 for each stdobjdef2 in doc_.stdobjdef for each flddef2 in stdobjdef2 if flddef2.ispersist then if flddef2.type = RELT_REF then if flddef2.reftypeid = stdobjdef.typeid then if iter_candel <> 0 then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "union" + vbCrLf end if strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "select TOP 5 'typeid'=cast(" + CStr(stdobjdef2.typeid) + " as integer),idobj from " +_ stdobjdef2.tablename + " where " + flddef2.name + "=@idobj_par" + vbCrLf iter_candel = iter_candel + 1 end if end if if flddef2.type = RELT_WILDREF then dim wildstdobj dim wildref_iter : wildref_iter = 0 dim wildref_typeid do wildref_typeid = flddef2.wildreftypeid(wildref_iter) if wildref_typeid = 0 then exit do end if if wildref_typeid = stdobjdef.typeid then if iter_candel <> 0 then strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "union" + vbCrLf end if strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "select TOP 5 'typeid'=cast(" + CStr(stdobjdef2.typeid) + " as integer),idobj from " + stdobjdef2.tablename +_ " where " + flddef2.name + "=@idobj_par and " + flddef2.name + "_wrt=" + CStr(stdobjdef.typeid) + vbCrLf iter_candel = iter_candel + 1 end if wildref_iter = wildref_iter + 1 loop end if end if next next strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf else strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if strSP = strSP + strSingleSP page_.updateview next end sub
sub generuj_drop_sp(byref strSP, byval bDebug) dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1,1,"generowanie stored procedures" view_message 4058, 0
strSP = "--========= dropping standard stored procedures =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim strSingleSP : strSingleSP = "" trans_.message 0,0,"dla tablicy " + stdobjdef.tablename
if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim procname strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "-- table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf
'_select (output param) procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_select" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf '_insert procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_insert" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf '_update procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_update" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf
'_delete procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_delete" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf '_maxid procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_maxid" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf '_candel procname = stdobjdef.tablename + "_candel" strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + procname + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure " + procname + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf else strSingleSP = strSingleSP + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if strSP = strSP + strSingleSP page_.updateview next end sub ' to_do: procedura generowania FK nie jest odporna na zmiany w tabelach ' potrzebne byłoby usuwanie wszystkich FK związanych z tabelami w projekcie ' lub jeśli jest to bezpieczne, wszystkich FK w bazie
sub generuj_dropfk(byref strDropFK) dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1,1,"generowanie drop foreign key" view_message 4059, 0
strDropFK = "--========= dropping FK =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim iter : iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef dim strCntrName : strCntrName = "" if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then if not flddef.isrefopt then dim fkstdobjdef: set fkstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strCntrName = "FK_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + "_" + CStr(iter) end if end if if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strCntrName = "WRT_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name + "_" + CStr(iter) end if if flddef.type = RELT_ENUM then strCntrName = "ENUM_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name + "_" + CStr(iter) end if if strCntrName <> "" then strDropFK = strDropFK + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + strCntrName + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " drop constraint " +_ strCntrName + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next else strDropFK = strDropFK + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if page_.updateview next strDropFK = strDropFK + "--========= dropping PK =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then strDropFK = strDropFK + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='PK_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_IdObj')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " drop constraint PK_" +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "_IdObj" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if next strDropFK = strDropFK + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end sub
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje klucze obce // '// strAddFK - zwraca kod dla kluczy // '///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// sub generuj_create_fk(byref strAddFK) 'to_do: być może lepiej zakładanie FK umieścić w SP dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1,1,"generowanie foreign key" view_message 4060, 0
strAddFK = "--========= creating PK =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then strAddFK = strAddFK + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " add constraint PK_" +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "_IdObj primary key clustered (IdObj)" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if next strAddFK = strAddFK + "--========= creating FK =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim iter : iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then if not flddef.isrefopt then dim fkstdobjdef: set fkstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strAddFK = strAddFK + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " add constraint FK_" +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + "_" + CStr(iter) + " foreign key (" +_ flddef.name + " ) references " + fkstdobjdef.tablename + " ( IdObj )" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if end if if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strAddFK = strAddFK + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " add constraint WRT_" +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name + "_" + CStr(iter) + " check (" + vbCrLf dim wildref_iter : wildref_iter = 0 dim wildref_typeid if flddef.isrefopt then strAddFK = strAddFK + vbTab + flddef.name + "_wrt=0 or " + vbCrLf end if do wildref_typeid = flddef.wildreftypeid(wildref_iter) if wildref_typeid = 0 then exit do end if '... if wildref_iter <> 0 then strAddFK = strAddFK + " or " + vbCrLf end if strAddFK = strAddFK + vbTab + flddef.name + "_wrt=" + CStr(wildref_typeid) wildref_iter = wildref_iter + 1 loop strAddFK = strAddFK + vbCrLf + ")" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if if flddef.type = RELT_ENUM then strAddFK = strAddFK + "alter table " + stdobjdef.tablename + " add constraint ENUM_" +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name + "_" + CStr(iter) + " check (" + vbCrLf dim maxenumval : maxenumval = 0 do if flddef.enumvalue(maxenumval) <> "" then maxenumval = maxenumval + 1 else exit do end if loop strAddFK = strAddFK + flddef.name + " between 0 and " + cstr(maxenumval) strAddFK = strAddFK + vbCrLf + ")" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end if
iter = iter + 1 next else strAddFK = strAddFK + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if page_.updateview next end sub
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje kod sprawdzający czy istnieja procedury // '// sprawdzanie dzieci itp. '// jezeli istnieja to usuwaj // '// strCSP - zwraca kod // '///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// sub generuj_checksp(byref strCSP)
'zwraca resultset w postaci: 'typeid, idobj, errorcode, param1 = (np. value which is bad), param2
' 1,1,"generowanie procedury testującej integralność" view_message 4061, 0
dim stdobjdef,flddef
strCSP = "--========== creating integrity test stored procedure" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf strCSP = strCSP + "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='n5check')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop procedure n5check" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf +_ "create procedure n5check with encryption as " + vbCrLf
'to_do: generowanie kodów błędów i większej ilości informacji
'1. sprawdzanie dzikich referencji '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'SELECT 't0.IdObj, t0.Nazwa, t0.pn5prackontragrupa, t0.pn5prackontragrupa_wrt 'FROM 'n5Zaswyk t0 'LEFT OUTER JOIN n5pracownik t1 ON t0.pn5prackontragrupa = t1.IdObj and t0.pn5prackontragrupa_wrt = 1 'LEFT OUTER JOIN n5kontrahent t2 ON t0.pn5prackontragrupa = t2.IdObj and t0.pn5prackontragrupa_wrt = 2 'WHERE '(t1.IdObj IS NULL) AND (t2.IdObj IS NULL) '-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then if not flddef.isrefopt then dim str dim wildref_iter : wildref_iter = 0 dim wildref_typeid str = "select " + CStr(stdobjdef.typeid) + "," + stdobjdef.tablename + ".IdObj, 1 from " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf do wildref_typeid = flddef.wildreftypeid(wildref_iter) if wildref_typeid = 0 then exit do end if dim wrstdobjdef: set wrstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(wildref_typeid) str = str + vbTab + "left outer join " + wrstdobjdef.tablename + " on " +_ stdobjdef.tablename + "." + flddef.name + "=" + wrstdobjdef.tablename + ".IdObj" +_ " and " + stdobjdef.tablename + "." + flddef.name + "_wrt=" + Cstr(wildref_typeid) + vbCrLf
wildref_iter = wildref_iter + 1 loop str = str + " where " + vbCrLf wildref_iter = 0 do wildref_typeid = flddef.wildreftypeid(wildref_iter) if wildref_typeid = 0 then exit do end if if wildref_iter <> 0 then str = str + " and " + vbCrLf end if set wrstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(wildref_typeid) str = str + vbTab + "(" + wrstdobjdef.tablename + ".IdObj is null)" wildref_iter = wildref_iter + 1 loop strCSP = strCSP + str + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if end if next end if page_.updateview next
'2. sprawdzanie referencji opcjonalnych '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'SELECT ' t3.IdObj, t3.pT ' FROM ' t3 ' LEFT OUTER JOIN t1 ON t3.pT = t1.IdObj ' WHERE ' (t3.pT <> 0) AND (t1.IdObj IS NULL)
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then if flddef.isrefopt then dim ropt_stdobjdef: set ropt_stdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) str = "select " + CStr(stdobjdef.typeid) + ",t1.IdObj, 2 from " + stdobjdef.tablename + " t1 " + vbCrLf +_ " left outer join " + ropt_stdobjdef.tablename + " t2 on t1." + flddef.name +_ "=t2.IdObj where (t1." + flddef.name + "<>0 and t2.IdObj is null)" + vbCrLf strCSP = strCSP + str + vbCrLf end if end if next end if page_.updateview next
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' UWAGA! skrypt sprawdzający collections zakłada że dzieci danego typu mają ojców tylko ' jednego typu. np. obiekt typu pozycjafaktury może być dzieckiem obiektu faktura i żadnego ' innego. Gdyby było inaczej, należy tam gdzie jest warunek idcollection=xxx zmienić ' na idcollection in (xxx,yyy) wygenerowane dla wszystkich rodzajów ojców mający takie dziecko ' ' '3. sprawdzanie collections '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Sprawdzenie czy są dziury w numeracji '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'SELECT IdCollection, IdParent 'FROM collections 'GROUP BY IdCollection, IdParent 'HAVING MAX(LP) > COUNT(*) '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- strCSP = strCSP + "select idcollection, idparent,3 from collections group by idcollection, idparent having max(lp) > count(*)" + vbCrLf
'4. Sprawdzenie czy istnieje (znajduje się w tablicy "parent") wymieniony w kolekcji "ojciec" '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'SELECT DISTINCT c.IdParent, c.IdCollection 'FROM collections c LEFT OUTER JOIN parent p ON c.IdParent = p.IdObj 'WHERE p.IdObj IS NULL '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim iter : iter = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_LIST then str = "select distinct collections.idcollection,collections.idparent,4 from collections left outer join " +_ stdobjdef.tablename + " on collections.idparent="+ stdobjdef.tablename + ".idobj where idcollection=" +_ cstr(stdobjdef.typeid * 1000 + iter) + " and " + stdobjdef.tablename + ".idobj is null" + vbCrLf strCSP = strCSP + str + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next end if page_.updateview next
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- '5. Sprawdzenie czy istnieje (znajduje się w tablicy tbl_dziecko1) dziecko w wymienionych kolekcjach (np. 1001 i 1002) 'SELECT c.IdObj, c.IdCollection 'FROM collections c LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_dziecko1 c1 on c.IdObj=c1.IdObj 'WHERE (c1.IdObj IS NULL) AND (c.IdCollection IN (1001,1002)) '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_LIST then dim strTableChild dim listdobjdef: set listdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strTableChild = listdobjdef.tablename str = "select collections.idcollection, collections.idobj,5 from collections left outer join " +_ strTableChild + " on collections.idobj="+ strTableChild + ".idobj where idcollection=" +_ cstr(stdobjdef.typeid * 1000 + iter) + " and (" + strTableChild + ".idobj is null)" + vbCrLf strCSP = strCSP + str + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next end if page_.updateview next
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- '6. Sprawdzenie czy w tablicy tbl_dziecko1 znajduje się dziecko (ekstra dziecko), które nie jest używane w żadnej z kolekcji w której mogłoby być użyte 'SELECT * FROM tbl_dziecko1 c1 'WHERE c1.IdObj NOT IN (SELECT c.IdObj FROM collections c WHERE c.IdCollection IN (1001,1002)) '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_LIST then set listdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strTableChild = listdobjdef.tablename str = "select " + cstr(listdobjdef.typeid) + "," + strTableChild + ".idobj,6 from " + strTableChild + " where " + strTableChild +_ ".idobj not in (select collections.idobj from collections where collections.idcollection=" +_ cstr(stdobjdef.typeid * 1000 + iter) + ")" + vbCrLf strCSP = strCSP + str + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next end if page_.updateview next
'----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' 7. Sprawdzenie czy nie ma powtórzeń dziecka w wymienionych kolekcjach. Kwerenda zwraca identyfikator "podejrzanego" dziecka 'SELECT IdObj 'FROM collections 'WHERE IdCollection in (11719007,11726003) 'GROUP BY IdObj 'HAVING COUNT(IdObj) > 1 '-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
strCSP = strCSP + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end sub
'///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// '// generuje indeksy // '// sprawdzanie dzieci itp. // '// strInx - zwraca kod // '///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// sub generuj_create_indices(byref strInx) dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1, 1, "indeksów" view_message 4062, 0
strInx = "--========= creating indices (UQ) =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim iter : iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.isunique and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa : nazwa = "UQ_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'create index for unique field strInx = strInx + "create unique index " + nazwa + " on " + stdobjdef.tablename + " (" + flddef.name + ")" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next else strInx = strInx + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if page_.updateview next
strInx = strInx + "--========= creating indices (FKI) =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim strSingleInx : strSingleInx = "" if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa2 : nazwa2 = "FKI_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'create nex fki_ index strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "create index " + nazwa2 + " on " + stdobjdef.tablename + " (" + flddef.name + ")" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa3 : nazwa3 = "WFKI_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'create nex fki_ index strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "create index " + nazwa3 + " on " + stdobjdef.tablename +_ " (" + flddef.name + "," + flddef.name + "_wrt )" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if
iter = iter + 1 next else strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if strInx = strInx + strSingleInx page_.updateview next end sub
sub generuj_drop_indices(byref strInx) dim stdobjdef dim flddef
' 1, 1, "indeksów" view_message 4062, 0
strInx = "--========= dropping indices (UQ) =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim iter : iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.isunique and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa : nazwa = "UQ_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'drop existing index strInx = strInx + "if exists (select * from sysindexes where name='"+nazwa+"')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop index " + stdobjdef.tablename + "." + nazwa + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if iter = iter + 1 next else strInx = strInx + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if page_.updateview next
strInx = strInx + "--========= dropping indices (FKI) =========" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim strSingleInx : strSingleInx = "" if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 1 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa2 : nazwa2 = "FKI_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'drop existing index strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "if exists (select * from sysindexes where name='"+nazwa2+"')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop index " + stdobjdef.tablename + "." + nazwa2 + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF and flddef.ispersist then dim nazwa3 : nazwa3 = "WFKI_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name 'drop existing index strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "if exists (select * from sysindexes where name='"+nazwa3+"')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop index " + stdobjdef.tablename + "." + nazwa3 + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf end if
iter = iter + 1 next else strSingleInx = strSingleInx + "-- skipped virtual table: " + stdobjdef.tablename + vbCrLf end if strInx = strInx + strSingleInx page_.updateview next end sub
sub generuj_create_views(byref strViews) dim stdobjdef dim flddef dim iter dim strView
trans_.message 1,0, "generowanie view" 'nie tłumaczyć na view_message! strViews = "--========= creating vlist_ views =========" + vbCrLf
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_LIST then strView = "create view vlist_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name + " as select " + vbCrLf strView = strView + "'coll_lp'=collections.lp,'p_versionid'=p.VersionId" 'pola tablicy ojca' dim oParFD for each oParFD in stdobjdef if oParFD.ispersist then strView = strView + ",'p_" + LCase(oParFD.name) + "'=p." + oParFD.name + vbCrLf if oParFD.type = RELT_WILDREF then strView = strView + ",'p_" + LCase(oParFD.name) + "_wrt'=p." + oParFD.name + "_wrt" + vbCrLf end if end if next strView = strView + ",'c_versionid'=c.VersionId" dim listdobjdef: set listdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) 'pola dziecka dim oChildFD for each oChildFD in listdobjdef if oChildFD.ispersist then strView = strView + ",'c_" + LCase(oChildFD.name) + "'=c." + oChildFD.name + vbCrLf if oChildFD.type = RELT_WILDREF then strView = strView + ",'c_" + LCase(oChildFD.name) + "_wrt'=c." + oChildFD.name + "_wrt" + vbCrLf end if end if next strView = strView + " from " + stdobjdef.tablename + " as p" + vbCrLf +_ " join collections on p.idobj=collections.idparent and collections.idcollection = " + cstr(stdobjdef.typeid * 1000 + iter) + vbCrLf +_ " join " + listdobjdef.tablename + " as c on c.idobj = collections.idobj " + vbCrLf +_ " go" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf strViews = strViews + strView end if iter = iter + 1 next end if page_.updateview next end sub
sub generuj_drop_views(byref strViews) dim stdobjdef dim flddef dim iter dim strView
trans_.message 1,0, "generowanie drop view" 'nie tłumaczyć na view_message! strViews = "--========= dropping vlist_ views =========" + vbCrLf
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then iter = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef if flddef.type = RELT_LIST then dim strViewName : strViewName = "vlist_" + stdobjdef.tablename + "_" + flddef.name strView = "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name='" + strViewName + "')" + vbCrLf +_ vbTab + "drop view " + strViewName + vbCrLf +_ "go"+ vbCrLf strViews = strViews + strView end if iter = iter + 1 next end if page_.updateview next end sub
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- '---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- sub generuj_special(byref strSpecial) strSpecial = _ "if exists (select * from sysobjects where name = 'n2001_setprofile_value')" + vbCrLf +_ " drop procedure n2001_setprofile_value" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf +_ "" + vbCrLf +_ "create procedure n2001_setprofile_value(@Indeks_par integer, @Wartosc_par varchar(255))" + vbCrLf +_ "as" + vbCrLf +_ "declare @P1 int" + vbCrLf +_ "select @P1 = 0" + vbCrLf +_ "select @P1 = IdObj from n5globprof where Indeks = @Indeks_par" + vbCrLf +_ "if @P1 = 0" + vbCrLf +_ " begin" + vbCrLf +_ " exec n5globprof_maxid @P1 output" + vbCrLf +_ " set @P1 = isNull(@P1,0) + 1" + vbCrLf +_ " execute n5globprof_insert @P1, 1, @Indeks_par, @Wartosc_par" + vbCrLf +_ " end" + vbCrLf +_ "else" + vbCrLf +_ " begin" + vbCrLf +_ " update n5globprof set Wartosc=@Wartosc_par where idobj= @P1" + vbCrLf +_ " end" + vbCrLf +_ "return 0" + vbCrLf +_ "go" + vbCrLf end sub
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function generuj_description(byval strSQLFileName) dim strDescFileName : strDescFileName = DESC_FILE dim so: set so = doc_.createstreamobj() dim stdobjdef dim flddef
for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef if stdobjdef.ispersist then dim nFieldNr : nFieldNr = 0 for each flddef in stdobjdef dim strLine if flddef.ispersist then strLine = cstr(stdobjdef.typeid) + vbTab + stdobjdef.tablename + vbTab + cstr(nFieldNr) + vbTab + flddef.name + vbTab + cstr(flddef.type) + vbTab +_ flddef.sqltypename + vbTab + "1" + vbTab + cstr(flddef.sqltype)+ vbCrLf if flddef.type = RELT_WILDREF then strLine = strLine + cstr(stdobjdef.typeid) + vbTab + stdobjdef.tablename + vbTab + cstr(nFieldNr) + vbTab + flddef.name + "_wrt" + vbTab + cstr(flddef.type) + vbTab +_ flddef.sqltypename + vbTab + "1" + vbTab + cstr(flddef.sqltype)+ vbCrLf end if else dim strSQLPseudoType select case flddef.type case RELT_FILE strSQLPseudoType = "<file>" case RELT_LIST strSQLPseudoType = "<list>" end select
strLine = cstr(stdobjdef.typeid) + vbTab + stdobjdef.tablename + vbTab + cstr(nFieldNr) + vbTab + flddef.name + vbTab + cstr(flddef.type) + vbTab +_ strSQLPseudoType + vbTab + "0" + vbTab + cstr(flddef.sqltype) + vbCrLf end if nFieldNr = nFieldNr + 1 so.write strLine next end if next
so.save strDescFileName end function
function generuj_skrypt_to_files(strCreateObjFileName,strCreateTblFileName,strDropFileName) dim strCreateSQL dim strCreateTables dim strCreateSP dim strCreateView dim strCreateFK dim strCreateInx dim strCreateCheckSP dim strCreateSpecial
dim strDropSQL dim strDropFK dim strDropSP dim strDropView dim strDropInx
' 1, 1, "rozpoczęcie generowania skryptu" view_message 4063, 0
strCreateSQL = "-- NAVO Enterprise SQL script (create) --" + vbCrLf +_ "-- generated: " + CStr(Now()) + vbCrLf strDropSQL = "-- NAVO Enterprise SQL script (drop) --" + vbCrLf +_ "-- generated: " + CStr(Now()) + vbCrLf
if (page_.ctrl(2).value = "1") then strCreateSQL = strCreateSQL + "use %DBNAME%" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf strDropSQL = strDropSQL + "use %DBNAME%" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf else strCreateSQL = strCreateSQL + "use navo2002" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf strDropSQL = strDropSQL + "use navo2002" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf end if
'---------- drop code---- generuj_dropfk strDropFK generuj_drop_views strDropView generuj_drop_sp strDropSP, (page_.ctrl(2).value = "1") generuj_drop_indices strDropInx
'---------- create code --- if (page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UPGRADE).value = "0") then generuj_create_tables strCreateTables if (page_.ctrl(2).value = "1") then strCreateTables = "use %DBNAME%" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf + strCreateTables else strCreateTables = "use navo2002" + vbCrLf + "go" + vbCrLf + strCreateTables end if end if generuj_create_views strCreateView generuj_create_sp strCreateSP, (page_.ctrl(2).value = "1"),trim(page_.ctrl(22).value) generuj_create_fk strCreateFK generuj_create_indices strCreateInx generuj_checksp strCreateCheckSP generuj_special strCreateSpecial
dim strAllDrop : strAllDrop = strDropFK + strDropSP + strDropView + strDropInx
dim strAllCreate : strAllCreate = ""
strAllCreate = strAllCreate + strCreateView + strCreateSP +_ strCreateFK + strCreateCheckSP + strCreateInx + strCreateSpecial
strCreateSQL = strCreateSQL + strAllCreate + "-- end of script ----" + vbCrLf strDropSQL = strDropSQL + strAllDrop + "-- end of script ----" + vbCrLf
dim soCreateObj: set soCreateObj = doc_.createstreamobj() dim soCreateTbl: set soCreateTbl = doc_.createstreamobj() dim soDrop : set soDrop = doc_.createstreamobj() soCreateObj.write strCreateSQL soCreateObj.save strCreateObjFileName if (page_.ctrl(CTRLID_UPGRADE).value = "0") then soCreateTbl.write strCreateTables soCreateTbl.save strCreateTblFileName end if
soDrop.write strDropSQL soDrop.save strDropFileName
' if (page_.ctrl(3).value="1") then ' 'wrzucaj na serwer ' ' dim sqls ' set sqls = createobject("SQLDMO.SQLServer") ' sqls.connect ".", "sa", "" ' ' ' 1, 1, "wykonywanie skryptu na serwerze SQL" ' view_message 4064, 0 ' ' on error resume next ' err.clear ' ' sqls.ExecuteImmediate strSQL ' if (err.number>0) then ' ' 1, 1, err.description ' view_message 6146, 0 ' else ' ' 1, 1, "skrypt został wykonany poprawnie" ' view_message 4065, 0 ' end if ' ' on error goto 0 ' end if
end function
function generuj_vbp dim stdobjdef for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef dim so set so = doc_.createstreamobj() so.write "VERSION 1.0 CLASS" + vbCrLf so.write "BEGIN" + vbCrLf so.write "MultiUse = -1 'True" + vbCrLf so.write "Persistable = 0 'NotPersistable" + vbCrLf so.write "DataBindingBehavior = 0 'vbNone" + vbCrLf so.write "DataSourceBehavior = 0 'vbNone" + vbCrLf so.write "MTSTransactionMode = 0 'NotAnMTSObject" + vbCrLf so.write "END" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_Name = """ + stdobjdef.tablename + """" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_GlobalNameSpace = False" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_Creatable = True" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_PredeclaredId = False" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_Exposed = True" + vbCrLf so.write "Attribute VB_Ext_KEY = ""Top_Level"" ,""Yes""" + vbCrLf so.write vbCrLf so.write "'script code begin" + vbCrLf so.write "dim this_" + vbCrLf so.write "dim trans_" + vbCrLf so.write "dim doc_" + vbCrLf so.write stdobjdef.scriptcode + vbCrLf so.write "'script code end" + vbCrLf so.save "c:\temp\vbp\" + stdobjdef.tablename + ".cls" next end function
function generuj_skrypt if page_.ctrl(5).value = "1" then generuj_description page_.ctrl(1).text else if page_.ctrl(4).value = "1" then generuj_vbp else generuj_skrypt_to_files page_.ctrl(1).text,page_.ctrl(21).text,page_.ctrl(11).text end if end if trans_.message 0,0,"KONIEC!!" msgbox "KONIEC!!" end function
function fopen #ifdef _DEBUG page_.ctrl(2).value="1" #endif
page_.ctrl(1).text = "c:\sprzedaz\create_objects_auto_14.sql" page_.ctrl(11).text = "c:\sprzedaz\drop_objects_auto_14.sql" page_.ctrl(21).text = "c:\sprzedaz\create_tables_auto_14.sql" page_.ctrl(12).value = clng(13) page_.ctrl(1001).text = "c:\sprzedaz\Obiekty danych #*varApplication.html" page_.ctrl(2001).text = "C:\nx\apps\eb5\eb5nxobj\" fopen = true end function
dim strUpgrade : strUpgrade = "0"
function c##CTRLID_UPGRADE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_UPGRADE##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value=strUpgrade end function
function c##CTRLID_UPGRADE##_ondataentered(ctrl, value) strUpgrade = value c##CTRLID_UPGRADE##_ondataentered = true if value = "1" then page_.ctrl(1).text = replace(page_.ctrl(1).text,"\create","\upgrade") else page_.ctrl(1).text = replace(page_.ctrl(1).text,"\upgrade","\create") end if page_.ctrl(21).disable = (value = "1") end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------- class csortujstdobjdef '----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zamień dwa elementy ze sobą '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function swapelements(byref pnavoarray, byref nindexelem1, byref nindexelem2) dim varElem set varElem = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1)
set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = varElem end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest < elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function less(byval elem1, byval elem2) Less = (elem1.tablename < elem2.tablename) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest > elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function more(byval elem1, byval elem2) More = (elem1.tablename > elem2.tablename) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest = elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function equal(byval elem1, byval elem2) Equal = (elem1.tablename = elem2.tablename) end function
end class
function posortuj_obiekty dim pArrStdObjDef set pArrStdObjDef = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() dim stdobjdef for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef pArrStdObjDef.Add stdobjdef next set pArrStdObjDef.Operations = new csortujstdobjdef pArrStdObjDef.Sort
set posortuj_obiekty = pArrStdObjDef end function
function spisobiektow(byref pArrStdObjDef) dim strTxt : strTxt = "" dim iter
strTxt = "<p>Spis obiektów</p>" + vbCrLf + _ "<table border=""1"" cellpadding=""0"" cellspacing=""0"" style=""border-collapse: collapse"" bordercolor=""#111111"" width=""48%"" id=""AutoNumber1""> " + vbCrLf
for iter = 0 to pArrStdObjDef.UpperIndex()
dim stdobjdef : set stdobjdef = pArrStdObjDef.Value(iter) dim strRow strRow = "<tr><td width=""38%""><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana""><a href=""#" + stdobjdef.tablename + """>" + stdobjdef.tablename + "</a></font></td>" +_ "<td width=""62%""><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana"">" + cstr(stdobjdef.typeid) + "</font></td></tr>" + vbCrLf strTxt = strTxt + strRow next spisobiektow = strTxt + "</table>" + vbCrLf end function
function file_header() file_header = "<html>" + vbCrLf + "<head>" + vbCrLf + "<meta http-equiv=""Content-Language"" content=""pl"">" + _ "<meta http-equiv=""Content-Type"" content=""text/html; charset=windows-1250"">" + vbCrLf + _ "<title>Obiekty danych #*varApplication </title>"+ vbCrLf + "</head>" + vbCrLf + _ "<body><font size=""4"" face=""Verdana""><p><b>Obiekty danych #*varApplication</b></p>" + vbCrLf +_ "<p>Wygenerowano: " + CStr(Now()) + "</p>" + vbCrLf end function
function file_footer() file_footer = "</font></body></html>" + vbCrLf end function
function obiekt_danych(byref pStdObjDef) dim strText strText = "<p><b><a name=""" + pStdObjDef.tablename +""">"+ pStdObjDef.tablename + _ "</a><br></b>" + cstr(pStdObjdef.typeid) + " (" + pStdObjdef.HumanName + ")</p>" + vbCrLf
strText = strText + "<table border=""1"" cellpadding=""0"" cellspacing=""0"" style=""border-collapse: collapse"" bordercolor=""#111111"" width=""470"">" + vbCrLf +_ "<tr><td ><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana""><b>Nazwa</b></font></td>" + _ "<td><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana""><b>Typ</b></font></td>" + _ "<td><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana""><b>Human name</b></font></td>" + _ "</tr>"
dim flddef dim fkstdobjdef for each flddef in pStdObjDef dim strRow dim strType strType = "" select case flddef.type case RELT_EMBED if flddef.ispersist then strType = strType + flddef.sqltypename else strType = strType + "[virtual]" end if case RELT_REF set fkstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strType = strType + "REF [<a href=""#" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + """>" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + "</a>]" case RELT_WILDREF strType = strType + "WILDREF<br/>" dim wildstdobj dim wildref_iter : wildref_iter = 0 dim wildref_typeid do wildref_typeid = flddef.wildreftypeid(wildref_iter) if wildref_typeid = 0 then exit do end if set fkstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(wildref_typeid) strType = strType + "[<a href=""#" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + """>" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + "</a>]<br/>" wildref_iter = wildref_iter + 1 loop
case RELT_ENUM strType = strType + "ENUM:<br/>"
dim nEnum: nEnum = 0 do while (flddef.enumvalue(nEnum) <> "")
strType = strType + "[" + flddef.enumvalue(nEnum) + "]<br/>" nEnum = nEnum + 1 loop case RELT_LIST set fkstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strType = strType + "LIST [<a href=""#" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + """>" + fkstdobjdef.tablename + "</a>]" case RELT_FILE strType = strType + "FILE" end select strRow = _ "<tr><td><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana"">" + flddef.name + "</font></td>" +_ "<td><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana"">" + strType + "</font></td>" +_ "<td><font size=""2"" face=""Verdana"">" + flddef.HumanName + "</font></td>" +_ "</tr>" + vbCrLf
strText = strText + strRow next
obiekt_danych = strText + "</table>" + vbCrLf end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function generuj_dokumentacje dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() pSO.write file_header() dim pArrStdObjDef set pArrStdObjDef = posortuj_obiekty() pSO.write spisobiektow(pArrStdObjDef) dim iter for iter = 0 to pArrStdObjDef.UpperIndex() pSO.write obiekt_danych(pArrStdObjDef.value(iter)) next pSO.write file_footer() pSO.save page_.ctrl(1001).text end function
function safe_ident(strVal) strVal = trim(strVal) if left(strVal,1) >= "0" and left(strVal,1) <= "9" then strVal = "e" + strVal end if strVal = replace(strVal," ","_") strVal = replace(strVal,"-","_") strVal = replace(strVal,"ł","l") strVal = replace(strVal,"ś","s") strVal = replace(strVal,"ó","o") strVal = replace(strVal,"ż","z") strVal = replace(strVal,"ą","a") strVal = replace(strVal,"ę","e") strVal = replace(strVal,".","_") strVal = replace(strVal,",","_") strVal = replace(strVal,")","_") strVal = replace(strVal,"(","_") safe_ident = replace(strVal,"%","_") end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function generuj_dotnet_one(byref pStdObjDef) dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() dim strFile : strFile = page_.ctrl(2001).text + pStdObjDef.tablename + ".cs" pSO.write "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf pSO.write "//data object class for " + pStdObjDef.tablename + " " + vbCrLf pSO.write "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf pSO.write "// typeid=" + cstr(pStdObjdef.typeid) + vbCrLf pSO.write "// generated:" + CStr(Now()) + vbCrLf pSO.write "//" + vbCrLf pSO.write "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf pSO.write "using System;" + vbCrLf ' pSO.write "using System.Collections;" + vbCrLf pSO.write "using nxappcore;" + vbCrLf pSO.write "using nxappcore.nxobjects;" + vbCrLf pSO.write "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf pSO.write "namespace eb5nxobj" + vbCrLf pSO.write "{" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "public class " + pStdObjDef.tablename + " : nxobj_" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf
'constructor pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "public " + pStdObjDef.tablename + "(object oNE2002Obj):" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + "base(oNE2002Obj)" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf
dim flddef 'enums pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "//----------------------------------------------------------------" + vbCrLf for each flddef in pStdObjDef if flddef.type = RELT_ENUM then pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "public enum " + flddef.name + "_enum" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf
dim nEnum: nEnum = 0 do while (flddef.enumvalue(nEnum) <> "") pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + safe_ident(flddef.enumvalue(nEnum)) + "," + vbCrLf nEnum = nEnum + 1 loop
pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "" + vbCrLf end if next
for each flddef in pStdObjDef dim strPropType : strPropType = "string" dim strMethod : strMethod = "getstrfield" if flddef.type = RELT_REF and flddef.ispersist then dim refstdobjdef: set refstdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strPropType = refstdobjdef.tablename strMethod = "(" + strPropType + ") getobjfield" else if flddef.type = RELT_EMBED then if flddef.sqltype = SQLcurrency or flddef.sqltype = SQLqty then strPropType = "decimal" strMethod = "getcurfield" elseif flddef.sqltype = SQLdate then strPropType = "DateTime" strMethod = "getdatefield" elseif flddef.sqltype = SQLlong then strPropType = "int" strMethod = "getlongfield" end if elseif flddef.type = RELT_ENUM then strPropType = flddef.name + "_enum" strMethod = "(" + flddef.name + "_enum)getlongfield" elseif flddef.type = RELT_LIST then dim listdobjdef: set listdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(flddef.reftypeid) strPropType = listdobjdef.tablename + "_list" strMethod = "(" + strPropType + ") null;// getobjfield" end if end if
pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "/// <summary>" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "/// " + flddef.humanname + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "/// </summary>" + vbCrLf
pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "public " + strPropType + " " + flddef.name + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + "get" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf
dim nFldNr:nFldNr = pStdObjDef.getfieldindex(flddef.name)
pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + "return " + strMethod + "(" + cstr(nFldNr) + ");" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + vbTab + "" + vbCrLf next pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf
if pStdObjDef.child then pSO.write vbTab + "public class " + pStdObjDef.tablename + "_list" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "{" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "" + vbCrLf pSO.write vbTab + "}" + vbCrLf end if
pSO.write "}" + vbCrLf pSO.write "" + vbCrLf
pSO.save strFile end function '--------------------------------------------------------------------------- function generuj_dotnet dim stdobjdef for each stdobjdef in doc_.stdobjdef generuj_dotnet_one stdobjdef next end function
